rules_applied: Q1: ABN (je/jij dominant strict). geâ†’je, gijâ†’jij, uâ†’je (object) or jou (emphatic), uwâ†’je. zijtâ†’bent. Verb conjugations adjusted.
Q2: niet only â€” never use nie for Smart Ass.
Q3: ik only (no 'k or da'k); 't free; 'n free.
Q4: Smart-acceptable expletives: Verdorie, Godsamme, Potverdikkie, Godver. Canonical = Godsamme. NEVER full godverdomme. verdommeâ†’verdorie.
Mismatch fix: E10_Hard J5 (Smart's EN was never properly translated; bogus NL replaced with Tom-approved Dutch).
decision_status: All Q-rules locked + character vocab rules + 1 mismatch fix. 28 cells.
